title: AVIATION EQUIPMENT PROCESSING Acquires VANTAGE ASSOCIATES in Strategic Transaction; Impact Capital Group Inc. Serves as Exclusive Advisor
summary: LOS ANGELES--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Aviation Equipment Processing (AEP) is a premier processing, bonding, and composites company serving both the commercial and military aerospace industries. AEP is one of the few companies approved to do Phosphoric Acid Anodizing (PAA) for Boeing, Lockheed Martin, Northrop Grumman, Robinson Helicopter and many other primes. title: Innovative Aerosystems Acquires Moog S-TEC Model 3100 Autopilot Product Line, Expanding Flight Control Portfolio
summary: EXTON, Pa.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Innovative Aerosystems (NASDAQ: ISSC) today announced it closed the acquisition of the Moog (NYSE: MOG.A) S-TEC Model 3100 general aviation fixed wing autopilot product line, further strengthening the companys position as a leading provider of advanced avionics, flight control, and mission-critical aerospace systems for commercial, business, and military aircraft.
